title: dendranthema zawadzkii var. lucida
intro: Dendranthema zawadzkii var. lucida, also known as the Lucid Chrysanthemum or Korean Chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used in Korean medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and inflammation, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dendranthema zawadzkii var. lucida include reducing inflammation and fever, soothing sore throats, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
